name: Teriyaki Honey Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a plastic bag.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and pour over the chicken in the bag, turning to coat.
3. Seal the bag and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours, turning 2 or 3 times.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and set aside. Reserve the marinade.
5. Arrange the chicken on a rack over an foil-lined broiler pan.
6. Cover the chicken with foil.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
8. Uncover the chicken and brush with marinade.
9. Continue baking, uncovered, for 30-45 minutes or until cooked through, brushing occasionally with marinade.
10. Serve four servings.
[Note: When trying this recipe, consider grilling the chicken on a gas grill. Make double the sauce to ensure leftovers remain flavorful without drying out.]
